personal.name: Trinath Anantham
personal.title: Senior Engineering Manager · System Architect
personal.bio: Versatile Engineering Leader with 12+ years of experience across backend, frontend, and cloud-based SaaS platforms. Skilled in building scalable systems, leading full-stack teams, and aligning technology with product strategy. Passionate about mentoring, innovation, and driving end-to-end execution.
personal.shortBio: I build scalable platforms, ship developer tools, and lead full-stack teams across SaaS, fintech, and AI.

highlights: Migrated legacy billing to microservices — deploys hours → minutes
Built multi-tenant subscription platform for 100K+ users
Scaled RabbitMQ & Pub/Sub to 2B+ monthly events
Cut API latency 70% and infra cost 40% via Redis + CDN
Shipped real-time analytics pipelines processing 100GB+/day
Standardized CI/CD on Docker, Jenkins, Kubernetes
Rolled out Prometheus + Grafana + ELK — MTTR down 45%
Drove $500K+ annual infra savings with product & finance

workExperience.title: Engineering Manager
workExperience.description: Leading the Workflows Automations Extended Team, Workflows AI Team, and Importer Team. Driving roadmap execution, delivery quality, and AI-driven automation enhancements.
achievements: Leading 3 teams: Workflow Automations, Workflows AI, and Importer
Owning AI-driven enhancements that boost automation intelligence and UX
Managing scalable data import pipelines and customer onboarding flows
Contributing to hiring, architecture decisions, and long-term product direction

workExperience.title: Senior Engineering Manager
workExperience.description: Promoted to Senior EM. Expanded ownership across Billing, Balance, and Subscriber services. Drove organizational scaling, cross-team alignment, and hiring strategy.
achievements: Led senior engineering decisions across multiple product lines
Mentored Engineering Managers and tech leads
Drove cross-functional initiatives across Billing & Balance domains

workExperience.title: Engineering Manager
workExperience.description: Led a 12+ member Billing Engineering Team. Architected and developed Billing and Balance microservices from the ground up for scalable, high-availability SaaS products.
achievements: Architected Billing & Balance microservices from ground up
Drove innovation across billing workflows, payments, and balance management
Active in performance reviews, hiring, and team growth
Deployed on GCP with Kubernetes; monitoring via New Relic, Grafana, BigQuery

workExperience.title: Engineering Manager
workExperience.description: Architected and built two microservices to integrate third-party APIs. Managed and mentored a 10-member engineering team.
achievements: Architected 2 microservices for third-party API integrations
Led migration of 200+ customers to new Rep Connector with zero downtime
Managed and mentored 10-member engineering team
Drove delivery excellence, code quality, and cross-team collaboration

workExperience.title: Development Team Lead
workExperience.description: Led integration team development. Built and scaled microservices for third-party API integrations across customer platforms.
achievements: Led integration platform engineering
Mentored engineers and drove technical roadmap
Owned ELK Stack log aggregation across AWS and GCP

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Developed scalable microservices using Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB for third-party API integrations. Built admin tools using React.
achievements: Built scalable integration microservices for enterprise customers
Developed React-based admin tools and dashboards
Enhanced partner onboarding and monitoring workflows

workExperience.title: Ex Co-Founder | Founding Engineer
workExperience.description: Architected and developed an end-to-end online IDE platform using React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, MongoDB, and Docker on AWS and Linux.
achievements: Scaled platform to support 2 million+ users globally
Implemented real-time code execution and sandboxing
Designed core product functionality from concept to launch
Launched cross-platform mobile app with Flutter & Dart

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
workExperience.description: Developed enterprise reporting UI using React and Kendo UI components. Built backend services with Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate, and Oracle DB.
achievements: Delivered enterprise reporting solutions
Built reporting engine with custom query builder
Worked with Oracle Database and OAF framework

education.description: Graduated with 76%. Strong foundation in engineering principles, mathematics, and computer science fundamentals.

projects.title: AI Builder — Agentic Workflows
projects.description: Leading the AI Builder team. Building complex workflows powered by AI agents, chat agents, intent detection, multi-step reasoning, RAG, GraphRAG, and VectorDB-backed retrieval. Enabling no-code AI automation for 1M+ HighLevel users with tool-calling, memory, and guardrails.
highlights: Designed multi-agent orchestration with tool-calling, memory, and human-in-the-loop
Shipped GraphRAG over knowledge graphs for richer context retrieval
Built intent detection layer routing 100K+ daily queries to specialized agents
Established evals + guardrails framework for production AI reliability

projects.title: Workflows IATF — Integrations Platform
projects.description: Leading the IATF (Integrations Actions/Triggers Framework) team. Built an internal portal to ship 100+ integration apps with 3rd-party actions and triggers across CRM, marketing, payments, and productivity tools. Unified schema, OAuth flows, retries, and observability.
highlights: Internal portal lets non-engineers ship integrations via config
Unified action/trigger schema across CRM, marketing, payments, and productivity apps
OAuth, retries, rate-limiting, and webhook fan-out baked in
Observability stack: structured logs, dashboards, alerts on partner errors

projects.title: Importer — External System Sync
projects.description: Leading the Importer team. Scalable data import pipelines from HubSpot, Make.com, and other external CRM/automation platforms into HighLevel. Schema mapping, deduplication, resumable jobs, and zero-downtime onboarding for enterprise customers.
highlights: Resumable import jobs survive worker restarts and partial failures
Smart schema mapping + deduplication for messy 3rd-party data
Connector framework — HubSpot, Make.com, more being added
Zero-downtime onboarding for enterprise migrations

projects.title: OneCompiler
projects.description: Co-founded and architected an online IDE platform supporting 60+ programming languages with real-time code execution and sandboxing. Scaled to serve 2 million+ users globally.
highlights: Designed sandboxed code execution across 60+ languages
Built real-time collaborative editor with low-latency sync
Scaled infra to 2M+ users globally on AWS + Docker
Drove product, hiring, and engineering culture from day zero

projects.title: OneCompiler Mobile
projects.description: Launched the OneCompiler mobile app using Flutter and Dart. Same powerful IDE features as the web platform, optimized for mobile with touch-friendly UI and offline capabilities.
highlights: Ported full IDE experience to Flutter for Android + iOS
Touch-optimized code editor with custom keyboard and gestures
Offline mode for code editing without active connection
Single codebase shipping to both Play Store and App Store

projects.title: Billing Service
projects.description: Built and led the development of an automated billing service from scratch. Stripe integration, NestJS backend, React/Remix frontend, MySQL, BigQuery analytics, Grafana monitoring.
highlights: Architected billing service from ground up for SaaS multi-tenant scale
Stripe integration with retry, dunning, and proration logic
Real-time analytics pipeline via BigQuery + Grafana
Hired and grew the team from 4 to 12+ engineers

projects.title: Balance Service
projects.description: Architected a balance service for deducting calls, SMS, transactions, and other services. Stripe integration, real-time analytics via BigQuery, Grafana dashboards.
highlights: Real-time balance deduction for calls, SMS, and transactional events
Idempotent deduction engine with reconciliation guarantees
Top-up flows via Stripe with automated low-balance alerts
BigQuery-backed analytics for usage forecasting

projects.title: Integration Service
projects.description: Built customer integration services using scalable microservices for third-party API integrations. ELK Stack log aggregation across AWS and GCP.
highlights: Built scalable microservices for 3rd-party API integrations
ELK Stack log aggregation across AWS + GCP
Admin tools in React for partner onboarding and monitoring
Hardened auth, retries, and rate-limiting for partner APIs

projects.title: Business Listing Scraper
projects.description: Automated business listing scraper handling millions of scraping jobs at scale across AWS and GCP with comprehensive monitoring.
highlights: Distributed scraper handling millions of jobs daily
Adaptive rate-limiting + proxy rotation to avoid blocks
Job orchestration with retries, dead-letter queues, and audit trail
Monitoring dashboards for partner SLAs

projects.title: Reporting Dashboards
projects.description: Enterprise reporting dashboards built with React + Kendo UI. Interactive data visualization, real-time reporting, custom charts.
highlights: Interactive enterprise dashboards with drag-and-drop widgets
Real-time reporting via WebSockets + Oracle DB
Custom chart components on top of Kendo UI
Responsive layouts for desktop and tablet

projects.title: Reporting Engine
projects.description: Comprehensive reporting engine to build any reporting query easily. Java + Spring Boot + Hibernate + Oracle DB with OAF framework.
highlights: Visual query builder generating optimized SQL
Reusable report templates with parameterized inputs
Hibernate + Oracle for cross-schema joins
Export to PDF, Excel, and CSV

projects.title: Enterprise BI Solutions
projects.description: Enterprise analytics and reporting solutions using Oracle BI Publisher and OBIEE. Data modeling, performance tuning, and Oracle EBS reporting.
highlights: Built data models on Oracle EBS for enterprise reporting
Optimized OBIEE dashboards and PL/SQL stored procedures
ODI pipelines for cross-source ETL
Custom BI Publisher templates for financial reports
